account.title: Account
account.name: Full name
account.notif_new_messages_desc: Notify when a customer sends a new message.
account.notif_new_conversations_desc: Alert when a fresh conversation enters Chat.
account.notif_email_digest_desc: Send a daily summary email for the workspace.
account.notif_sound_desc: Play a sound alert on new activity.
account.your_timezone_desc: Used to display times across the dashboard and in reports.

settings.confirmItFromYourInbox: . Confirm it from your inbox to activate the new email.
settings.aCallPermissionRequestAdds: A call permission request adds Allow / Don't allow buttons automatically. Custom buttons are not available for this type.
settings.aPermanentSystemUserToken: A permanent system-user token with whatsapp_business_messaging.
settings.aRequestContactInfoTemplate: A request contact info template adds a button that asks the customer to share their contact details.
settings.aSimulatedSandboxChannelActions: A simulated sandbox channel. Actions here never reach real customers, so you can test flows safely.
settings.capiDatasetHelp: Sends funnel conversions (Qualified Lead, Appointment, Booking) back to Meta so ad delivery optimizes toward leads that convert. Leave blank to turn off.
settings.addARoleThenTick: Add a role, then tick its permissions in the checklist.
settings.addATeamMemberTo: Add a team member to the workspace.
settings.appendEverySubmissionAsA: Append every submission as a new row.
settings.approvedWhatsappTemplateForOut: Approved WhatsApp template for out-of-window follow-ups (day 1/3/7). Free-form nudges at 12h/20h don't need it. Only APPROVED templates appear.
settings.askCustomersIfYouCan: Ask customers if you can call them on WhatsApp.
settings.askCustomersToShareTheir: Ask customers to share their contact details.
settings.autoFollowUpNudgesA: Auto follow-up nudges a silent lead at 12h and 20h with free-form AI messages (inside WhatsApp's 24h window). Later touches at day 1, 3 and 7 fall outside the window, so they need an approved template. No template = those later touches are skipped; the lead is still auto-closed to Lost if there's no reply.
settings.branchesAreSubUnitsOf: Branches are sub-units of this campaign (offices, stores, locations). Each has its own ad sources and agents; leads route by ad source to the matching branch. Skip this to route everything to the campaign's default agents.
settings.caption: Caption
settings.chooseHowToCreateA: Choose how to create a template
settings.chooseThePlatformYouWant: Choose the platform you want to connect. You can add more channels any time.
settings.chooseWhatToConnectAd: Choose what to connect. Ad platforms pull spend, results and cost per lead; Google Analytics adds landing-page sessions and engagement.
settings.connectAMetaAdAccount: Connect a Meta ad account, then map its campaigns. Spend and results show on the Dashboard.
settings.connectAnAdAccountOr: Connect an ad account or Google Analytics. Spend, results and landing-page metrics show on the Dashboard.
settings.connectAnAdPlatformOr: Connect an ad platform or external system to capture leads via the Web API.
settings.connectOrCreateAWhatsapp: Connect or create a WhatsApp Business account in a few clicks.
settings.connectWhatsappMessengerInstagramViber: Connect WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Viber and more.
settings.connectedButTheFirstSync: Connected, but the first sync failed. Fix the token from the account card, then sync.
settings.copyYourApiKeyNow: Copy your API key now. You can always view it again from the source card.
settings.couldNotReadThisPdf: Could not read this PDF automatically. Try a cleaner text PDF, or upload a CSV/Excel.
settings.createACampaignToStart: Create a campaign to start routing its leads.
settings.createAViberPublicAccount: Create a Viber Public Account, then paste its authentication token from the Viber Admin Panel. We verify the token and register the inbound webhook for you.
settings.createAWhatsappTemplateAnd: Create a WhatsApp template and submit it for approval.
settings.createTheFirstOrganizationTo: Create the first organization to get started.
settings.createYourFirstAutomationTo: Create your first automation to route messages and reply automatically.
settings.createYourTemplateFromScratch: Create your template from scratch. Once you finish creating your template, it must be submitted for review.
settings.ctwaAdSourceIdsUsed: CTWA ad source IDs (used when no branch matches)
settings.defaultsToChangeme123IfLeft: Defaults to changeme123 if left blank
settings.displayYourProductsCreateA: Display your products - create a carousel of images and buttons for up to 10 cards.
settings.enterAPropertyIdAnd: Enter a property id and refresh token manually
settings.enterYourWhatsappBusinessAccount: Enter your WhatsApp Business Account credentials from Meta.
settings.exportQueuedTrackItIn: Export queued. Track it in the Downloads tab.
settings.foundUnderAccountEditInfo: Found under Account > Edit Info > Webhook in the Viber Admin Panel.
settings.getStartedFasterWithPre: Get started faster with pre-written templates. Use one as is or customize the content to your needs.
settings.givesTheAiClearContext: Gives the AI clear context for on-brand replies.
settings.googleConnectedChooseTheProperty: Google connected. Choose the property to sync.
settings.googleSheetsIsnTConnected: Google Sheets isn't connected yet. An admin needs to add the service-account key on the server.
settings.inThisCampaignSCatalog: in this campaign's catalog. Click a row to edit.
settings.label: Label
settings.leadsFromThisSourceAre: Leads from this source are attributed to the campaign and round-robin assigned to its agents.
settings.leaveBlankToKeepCurrent2: Leave blank to keep current password
settings.leaveTheCustomNameEmpty: Leave the custom name empty to keep it translated automatically per language.
settings.lowBalanceTopUpBefore: Low balance. Top up before the AI stands down on this campaign.
settings.managersSpvWhoCanSee: Managers/SPV who can see this campaign's leads but are never assigned in the rotation.
settings.mapThisAccountSCampaigns: Map this account's campaigns to yours so spend ties to leads on the Dashboard.
settings.nameItAndPickWhat: Name it and pick what it's for. You can change this later.
settings.newPasswordMustBeAt: New password must be at least 8 characters
settings.noAllocationSetAiReplies: No allocation set: AI replies aren't capped. Set a cap below to meter this campaign.
settings.noApprovedTemplatesYetCreate: No approved templates yet. Create one and get it approved under Templates to enable day 1/3/7 follow-ups.
settings.noBranchesLeadsRouteTo: No branches. Leads route to the campaign's default agents.
settings.noCampaignsSyncedYetYou: No campaigns synced yet. You can map them later from the account's Edit dialog.
settings.noCampaignsYetSyncThis: No campaigns yet. Sync this account to pull them.
settings.noChannelSetLeadsWon: No channel set. Leads won't route until a channel is assigned.
settings.noExportsYetUseThe: No exports yet. Use the Export button on any tab.
settings.noFormsYetCreateYour: No forms yet. Create your first WhatsApp Form.
settings.noGa4PropertiesWereFound: No GA4 properties were found for this Google account. Make sure it has access to a GA4 property (and the Analytics Admin API is enabled), then try again.
settings.noPricingRowsWereFound: No pricing rows were found in this PDF. Try a CSV/Excel export instead.
settings.noRowsFoundMakeSure: No rows found. Make sure the first row is a header (e.g. item_name, price).
settings.notifyTheTeamWhenA: Notify the team when a customer sends a new message.
settings.onlyAnOwnerOrAdmin: Only an owner or admin can edit pipeline stages.
settings.pdfExtractionIsNotEnabled: PDF extraction is not enabled on the server. Upload a CSV or Excel file instead.
settings.perBranchAdSourcesAre: Per-branch ad sources are set in step 2. These campaign-level IDs route leads when no branch matches.
settings.pickTheEventThatStarts: Pick the event that starts this automation. Build the actions in the flow after.
settings.pickWhereTheLeadsCome: Pick where the leads come from. We generate an API key you point that source to.
settings.pointYourLeadSourceAt: Point your lead source at the endpoint below using this API key. Each lead opens a conversation in Chat.
settings.presencePowersPerformanceMetricsOnly: Presence powers performance metrics only; it does not affect lead distribution. Active days drive billing.
settings.publishingPushesThisFormTo: Publishing pushes this form to WhatsApp so you can send it to contacts.
settings.readOnlyAccessAnalyticsReadonly: Read-only access (analytics.readonly). We open Google's consent screen, then bring you back here to pick a property.
settings.removeAllCatalogRowsFor: Remove all catalog rows for this campaign? The bot will fall back to the shared pricing table.
settings.roundRobinUsedWhenNo: Round-robin. Used when no branch matches.
settings.rowsWithoutALocationColumn: Rows without a location column get tagged with these. Add more than one to apply the same pricelist to several cities. Leave empty if the file already has a location column.
settings.runTestOnTheChannel: Run Test on the channel card to verify the connection and mark it connected.
settings.selectableButTheEngineDoes: Selectable, but the engine does not fire this event yet.
settings.sendThisFormToWhich: Send this form to which WhatsApp number? (with country code, no +)
settings.shareThisWithTheOwner: Share this with the owner; they can change it after signing in.
settings.showACallButtonIn: Show a call button in Chat (opens WhatsApp and logs the attempt).
settings.simpulerCreditsAreTheOrg: Simpuler credits are the org-wide monthly AI-reply pool. Each campaign draws from it via its Credits & Usage allocation.
settings.terminalLostStagesTheseAlways: Terminal lost stages. These always sit at the end and can't be removed.
settings.theAiAutoSendsThis: The AI auto-sends this WhatsApp form on its first reply to collect full lead details.
settings.theAiSendsThisWhatsapp: The AI sends this WhatsApp form on the first response to collect complete lead details.
settings.theChannelIsLiveAnd: The channel is live and ready to send and receive messages.
settings.theSellingStagesALead: The selling stages a lead moves through, top to bottom.
settings.theTextInsertedWhenThe: The text inserted when the shortcut is used
settings.thisBusinessUsesASecure: This business uses a secure service from Meta to manage this chat. Tap to learn more
settings.thisIsPermanentTheyLose: This is permanent: they lose access and their open leads are reassigned. Past history stays for the record. To pause an account temporarily, use Deactivate instead.
settings.thisLooksLikeAScanned: This looks like a scanned PDF (no readable text). Use a text PDF, or upload a CSV/Excel.
settings.title: Title
settings.totalAdBudgetForThis: Total ad budget for this campaign. Powers Budget Utilization in the Ads Report (budget vs actual spend). Leave blank to skip.
settings.tryADifferentSearchOr: Try a different search or filter.
settings.typedFieldStoredOnEvery: Typed field stored on every contact.
settings.upTo10ImageButton: Up to 10 image/button cards in one message.
settings.uploadAPricelistCsvExcel: Upload a pricelist (CSV, Excel, or PDF)
settings.uploadEitherAnImageOr: Upload either an image or video.
settings.usedForThePageMeta: Used for the page meta/description tag
settings.verifyTokenMustMatchMeta: Verify token (must match META_VERIFY_TOKEN on the server)
settings.weWillEmailAVerification: We will email a verification link to the new address. The change applies only after you confirm it.
settings.webhookUrlSetInMeta: Webhook URL (set in Meta > WhatsApp > Configuration)
settings.whenOnTheAiReplies: When on, the AI replies automatically, nurtures the lead until the key details are collected, then notifies an agent to take over.
settings.whichConnectedNumberThisForm: Which connected number this form publishes and sends from.
settings.youCanChangeTheseAnytime: You can change these anytime from the account's Edit dialog.
settings.youDoNotHavePlatform: You do not have platform access.
settings.youWillSignInWith: You will sign in with Facebook and pick (or create) a WhatsApp Business number. We finish the setup automatically: subscribe the app, register the number and connect the channel.
settings.yourMessageBodyWillAppear: Your message body will appear here.
settings.author: Author
settings.accountIdAndAccessToken: Account id and access token are required.
settings.nameMustBeLowercaseLetters: Name must be lowercase letters, numbers and underscores
settings.propertyIdAndRefreshToken: Property id and refresh token are required.
settings.wabaIdAndPhoneNumber: WABA ID and Phone Number ID are required
settings.deactivateMsg: {{x}} will lose access until reactivated. Their leads and history stay intact.
settings.pickCityBeforeUpload: Pick at least one city first. It sets the campaign's service area and tags every row in the pricelist.
settings.industryLocked: Set by Simpulx at onboarding. Contact support to change it.
settings.listingEmptyBody: Add your first unit so the AI can recommend it to buyers.
settings.listingSiteSubtitle: Address, logo, colour and tagline of your microsite
settings.listingSiteUrlHint: Share this link with buyers; the AI also sends it when recommending a unit.
settings.listingAccentHint: Used for buttons and accents on the listing site
settings.listingTaglinePh: Comfortable homes in the heart of the city
settings.listingPriceHint: Shown on the public listing site and used by the AI to match a lead's budget
settings.listingPhotosHint: The first photo becomes the cover. Up to {{max}} photos.
settings.listingCampaignHint: Scope this unit to one campaign so the AI prioritises it for that campaign's leads
settings.listingDescriptionHint: Used by the AI when explaining the unit to a buyer
settings.listingDescriptionPh: Two-storey house near the station, corner lot, move-in ready...
settings.listingLatHint: For the map pin on the listing site
settings.listingDeleteBody: Remove "{{title}}" from the listing? This cannot be undone.
settings.listingFeaturesHint: Comma-separated, shown as badges on the listing site (e.g. Bisa Nego, Full Furnished, Siap Huni)
settings.listingFeaturesPh: Bisa Nego, Full Furnished, Siap Huni, Bebas Banjir
settings.listingMapHint: Paste a Google Maps share link and the map pin fills itself. No need to find latitude/longitude.
settings.listingMapResolveFailed: Could not read that Maps link. Try opening it and copying the full URL.
settings.listingMapInvalid: That doesn't look like a Google Maps link.
settings.listingUnitUrlHint: Direct link to this unit's page. Share it or paste it into an ad.

dashboard.dailyLeadsDesc: Daily leads and replies will show here
dashboard.yourActivitySub: New leads vs how many replied back
dashboard.marketingFunnelSub: Impression to click to chat to conversion
dashboard.adPerformanceBrokenDownBy: Ad performance broken down by traffic source
dashboard.connectAMetaAdAccount: Connect a Meta ad account to add spend, cost per lead and ROI. The lead attribution below works without it.
dashboard.connectAMetaAdAccount2: Connect a Meta ad account with click-to-WhatsApp ads to see per-creative insight.
dashboard.considerOptimizingTheLandingPage: Consider optimizing the landing page or follow-up process.
dashboard.googleSearchConsoleHasnT: Google Search Console hasn't collected enough data.
dashboard.noCreativeDroveALead: No creative drove a lead yet.
dashboard.noSourceDataInThis: No source data in this range
dashboard.noWastedSpendEveryPaid: No wasted spend. Every paid creative got a lead.
dashboard.overallConversionRateFromImpression: Overall conversion rate from impression to purchase
dashboard.showsTheConversionProgressionFrom: Shows the conversion progression from ad impressions through to purchases
dashboard.spamJunkLeadsCountedSeparately: Spam / junk leads, counted separately so they never inflate the loss rate
dashboard.averageCostPerLeadIn: average cost per lead in this range.

contacts.addALabelAndPress: Add a label and press Enter
contacts.addALabelToThe: Add a label to the selected contacts.
contacts.addANoteVisibleTo: Add a note (visible to your team only)
contacts.notesAreAvailableOnceThis: Notes are available once this contact has a conversation.
contacts.onlyApprovedWhatsappTemplatesCan: Only approved WhatsApp templates can start a conversation outside the 24 hour window.
contacts.thisAlsoRemovesTheirConversations: This also removes their conversations. This cannot be undone.
contacts.noConversationYetForThis: No conversation yet for this contact

auth.enterYourEmailAndWe: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

auth.yourPasswordHasBeenUpdated: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.

automation.aConditionalEntryPointAdds: A conditional entry point - adds a keyword branch
automation.blocksThisContactFromFuture: Blocks this contact from future outreach. No configuration needed.
automation.branchOnAContactAttribute: Branch on a contact attribute (match / else)
automation.callbackIdsAreAutoGenerated: Callback IDs are auto-generated and editable. A
automation.clearsTheConversationSAssigned: Clears the conversation's assigned agent. No configuration needed.
automation.clearsTheConversationSCampaign: Clears the conversation's campaign. No configuration needed.
automation.configurableNowTheEngineDoesn: Configurable now; the engine doesn't execute this action type yet.
automation.configurableButTheEngineDoesn: Configurable, but the engine doesn't evaluate this condition yet.
automation.configurableNotYetExecutedBy: Configurable, not yet executed by the engine
automation.googleSheetsIsnTConnected: Google Sheets isn't connected yet (an admin must add the service-account key).
automation.handleForWhenItS: handle for when it's true and
automation.messageTextExactlyMatchesAny: Message text exactly matches any of keywords
automation.messageTextExcludesAnyOf: Message text excludes any of keywords
automation.messageTextIncludesAnyOf: Message text includes any of keywords
automation.noPublishedFormsYetPublish: No published forms yet. Publish one in WhatsApp Forms first.
automation.rowAppendedTimestampNamePhone: Row appended: timestamp, name, phone, then each attribute.
automation.sentViaYourConfiguredSmtp: Sent via your configured SMTP. Supports
automation.shareYourGoogleSheetEditor: Share your Google Sheet (Editor) with this account:
automation.subject: Subject
automation.typeAKeywordEnterTo: Type a keyword, Enter to add

automation.orAnyContactAttributeIn: or any contact attribute in the value.

broadcasts.basedOnMetaWhatsappBusiness: Based on Meta WhatsApp Business pricing. Actual cost may vary.
broadcasts.chooseAPreApprovedWhatsapp: Choose a pre-approved WhatsApp template to send.
broadcasts.giveYourBroadcastARecognizable: Give your broadcast a recognizable name for internal reference.
broadcasts.noApprovedTemplatesFoundFor: No approved templates found for this channel.
broadcasts.noContactsWithAPhone: No contacts with a phone number available.
broadcasts.onlySendToContactsWith: Only send to contacts with any selected label. Leave empty to send to all.
broadcasts.pastePhoneNumbersSeparatedBy: Paste phone numbers separated by commas, newlines, or spaces. Matching contacts are auto-selected.
broadcasts.selectAtLeastOneContact: Select at least one contact with a phone number.
broadcasts.selectTheNumberToSend: Select the number to send from.
broadcasts.sendATestToOne: Send a test to one contact before launching the full broadcast.
broadcasts.sendBulkMessagesToYour: Send bulk messages to your contacts at once.
broadcasts.targetAllContactsOrPick: Target all contacts or pick specific contacts only.
broadcasts.toggleOffToSaveAs: Toggle off to save as a draft first.
broadcasts.writeYourBroadcastMessageAnd: Write your broadcast message and send a test first.

components.appendContactDataAsA: Append contact data as a new sheet row

components.connectATelegramBotTo: Connect a Telegram bot to chat with customers on Telegram.

delete-account.yourAccountAndDataWill: . Your account and data will be deleted within 30 days. You'll receive a confirmation email once the process is complete.
delete-account.theFollowingDataWillBe: ⚠️ The following data will be permanently deleted:
delete-account.couldNotSubmitYourRequest: Could not submit your request. Please email support@simpulx.com to delete your account.
delete-account.emailAddressAssociatedWithYour: Email address associated with your account *
delete-account.weReSorryToSee: We're sorry to see you go. Submitting this form will initiate the deletion of your account and all associated data.
delete-account.weVeReceivedYourDeletion: We've received your deletion request for
delete-account.yourDeletionRequestWillBe: Your deletion request will be processed within 30 days. During this period, you may contact

export.downloadHistoricalDataInCsv: Download historical data in CSV format for offline reporting and analytics.
export.exportCampaignPerformanceDataIncluding: Export campaign performance data including leads generated, messages sent, engagement metrics, and conversion rates for all campaigns.
export.exportDetailedChatRecordsIncluding: Export detailed chat records including SLA tracking (response times), follow-up activity, pipeline stages, lead qualifications, and call attempts.

inbox.24HourWindowClosedOnly: 24-hour window closed. Only template messages can be sent.

inbox.customerAlreadyAllowedCallsYou: Customer already allowed calls, you can call now

inbox.pickTheFinalStageFor: Pick the final stage for this lead before closing.

settings.serviceAreaHint: Used to spot out-of-area leads and to target ads. Works without a catalog.
settings.noServiceAreaYet: No service area set yet. Add the cities this campaign serves before uploading a pricelist.
settings.pickCityBeforeUpload: Set the campaign's service area first.
